sub_modules.fp_lpf_coeff_rom: Combinational coefficient ROM for the 101 binary32 low-pass FIR taps.
sub_modules.fp_lpf_tap_mult: Combinational tap multiplier wrapper for one sample and one coefficient.
sub_modules.fp_lpf_accum_add: Combinational binary32 accumulator adder wrapper used in the FIR sum chain.
